```{r}
kbl(CollegeTabCSE, booktabs=T, longtable = T, caption= "Unique Student Interactions by College", align= align_vec_collegeCSE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position","scale_down"), font_size = 10) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrows_collegeCSE-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrows_collegeCSE, bold=T) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)

```

\raggedright\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by Class Standing (Unit: CSE)}}}

```{r}
#| label: OvrllClssStndCSE
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false

pacman::p_load("tidyverse", "janitor", "lubridate","stringr","forcats", "openxlsx", "tidyr","kableExtra", "scales", "knitr")

ovrllClssStndTabCSE <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit=="CSE") %>%
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  tabyl(`Class Standing`) %>% 
  rename("Count"= n, "Percentage(%)"=percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(`Percentage(%)`)) %>% 
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(,digits=2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~comma(.))) 
  
nrow_clssStnd <- nrow(ovrllClssStndTabCSE)
align_vec_clssstnd <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(ovrllClssStndTabCSE) - 1))

kbl(ovrllClssStndTabCSE,booktabs=T, linesep = "", caption= "Unique Student Interactions by Class Standing", align=align_vec_clssstnd) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position","scale_down"), font_size = 10) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_clssStnd-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_clssStnd, bold=T) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)
```

\newpage
\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by Cohort (Team: CSE)}}}

```{r}
#| label: ChrtTblCSE
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false

CohortTblCSE <- Clean_Event %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  filter(Unit== "CSE", Cohort!= "Missing") %>% 
  tabyl(`Cohort`) %>% 
  rename("Count" = n, "Percentage(%)" = percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 6) %>% 
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(digits = 2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~ comma(.))) 
   
CohortYr_missing <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit== "CSE", Cohort== "Missing") %>% 
  nrow(.) %>% 
  comma(.)
  
nrow_clssStnd <- nrow(ovrllCohortTbl)
align_vec_clssstnd <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(ovrllCohortTbl) - 1))

kbl(CohortTblCSE,booktabs=T, linesep="",caption= "Unique Student Interactions by Cohort", align=align_vec_clssstnd) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position","scale_down"), font_size = 10) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_clssStnd-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_clssStnd, bold=T) %>% 
  footnote(general = paste0("There are ", CohortYr_missing, " students with missing cohort data. Students with cohort years before AY2020-21 were also removed."), threeparttable = T)

```

\raggedright\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by Transfer Status (Unit: CSE)}}}
```{r}
#| label: CrteTrnsfrCSE
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false
#| tbl-cap: Unique Interactions by Transfer Status

  TrnsfrTabCSE <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit== "CSE") %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  tabyl(Transfer) %>% 
  rename("Count"= n, "Percentage(%)"=percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%  
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(,digits=2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~comma(.)))

nrow_trnsfr <- nrow(TrnsfrTabCSE)
align_vec_trnsfr <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(TrnsfrTabCSE) - 1))

kbl(TrnsfrTabCSE, booktabs=T, align= align_vec_trnsfr) %>% 
  kable_styling(latex_options = "scale_down", full_width= F) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_trnsfr-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_trnsfr, bold= T) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)

```

\raggedright\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by First-Generation Status (Unit: CSE)}}}

```{r}
#| label: FirstGenCSE
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false
#| tbl-cap: "Unique Interactions by First-Generation Status"

  CSE1stGenTab <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit== "RHUU") %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  rename("FirstGen"= "First-gen") %>% 
  tabyl(FirstGen) %>% 
  rename("Count"= n, "Percentage(%)"=percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%  
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(,digits=2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~comma(.)))

nrow_FrstGen <- nrow(CSE1stGenTab)
align_vec_trnsfer <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(CSE1stGenTab) - 1))

kbl(CSE1stGenTab, booktabs=T, align= align_vec_trnsfer) %>% 
  kable_styling(latex_options = "scale_down", full_width= F) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_FrstGen-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_FrstGen, bold= T) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)

```

\newpage
## Student Governance (StuGov)

\raggedright\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by Race \& Gender (Combined) (Unit: StuGov)}}}

```{r}
#| label: RaceGenStuGov
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false

GenRaceTabSG <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit=="SG") %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  tabyl(Race, Sex) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Female)) %>% 
  adorn_totals(c("row","col")) %>%
  adorn_percentages("all") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(digits = 2) %>% 
  adorn_ns(position = "front")

nrow_SG <- nrow(GenRaceTabSG)
ncol_SG <- ncol(GenRaceTabSG)
align_vec_SG <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(GenRaceTabSG) - 1))

kbl(GenRaceTabSG, booktabs = TRUE, caption = "Unique Student Interactions by Race and Gender", align = align_vec_SG) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("Hold_position", "scale_down")) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(nrow_SG-1, hline_after = TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(nrow_SG, bold = TRUE) %>%
  column_spec(ncol_SG, bold = TRUE) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)

GenRaceTabSG_cnt <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit=="SG")
 
nrowUnit_SG_written <- scales::comma(nrow(GenRaceTabSG_cnt))
nrowUnit_SG_numeric <- nrow(GenRaceTabSG_cnt)

SG_pct <- paste0(format((nrowUnit_SG_numeric/nRow_dat * 100), digits=4), "%")

totalEvents_UnitTeams <- unique(Clean_Event[,c("Unit", "Team", "Event")]) %>% 
  group_by(Unit, Team) %>% 
  summarize(Count= n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  arrange()

TotalEvents_Unit <- unique(Clean_Event[,c("Unit", "Team", "Event")]) %>% 
  group_by(Unit) %>% 
  summarize(Count=n())

numSG_events <- TotalEvents_Unit %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Unit== "SG") %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Count)
```

The Leadership and Service Center as a whole accounted for `{r} nrowUnit_SG_written` total student interactions making up `{r} SG_pct` of the total student engagements, hosting `{r} numLSC_events` events. These tables show theat the majority of attendees are White Females. 

\raggedright\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by College (Unit: SG)}}}

```{r}
#| label: CollegeTabSG
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false

CollegeTabSG <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit == "SG") %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  tabyl(College) %>% 
  rename("Count"= n, "Percentage(%)"=percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%  
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(,digits=2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~comma(.)))
  
nrows_collegeSG <- nrow(CollegeTabSG)
align_vec_collegeSG <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(CollegeTabSG) - 1))

kbl(CollegeTabSG, booktabs=T, longtable = T, caption= "Unique Student Interactions by College", align= align_vec_collegeSG) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position","scale_down"), font_size = 10) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrows_collegeSG-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrows_collegeSG, bold=T) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)

```

\newpage
\raggedright\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by Class Standing (Unit: SG)}}}

```{r}
#| label: OvrllClssStndSG
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false

pacman::p_load("tidyverse", "janitor", "lubridate","stringr","forcats", "openxlsx", "tidyr","kableExtra", "scales", "knitr")

ovrllClssStndTabSG <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit=="SG") %>%
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  tabyl(`Class Standing`) %>% 
  rename("Count"= n, "Percentage(%)"=percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(`Percentage(%)`)) %>% 
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(,digits=2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~comma(.))) 
  
nrow_clssStnd <- nrow(ovrllClssStndTabSG)
align_vec_clssstnd <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(ovrllClssStndTabSG) - 1))

kbl(ovrllClssStndTabSG,booktabs=T, linesep = "", caption= "Unique Student Interactions by Class Standing", align=align_vec_clssstnd) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position","scale_down"), font_size = 10) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_clssStnd-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_clssStnd, bold=T) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)
```

\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by Cohort (Team: SG)}}}

```{r}
#| label: ChrtTblSG
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false

CohortTblSG <- Clean_Event %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  filter(Unit== "SG", Cohort!= "Missing") %>% 
  tabyl(`Cohort`) %>% 
  rename("Count" = n, "Percentage(%)" = percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 6) %>% 
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(digits = 2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~ comma(.))) 
   
CohortYr_missing <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit== "SG", Cohort== "Missing") %>% 
  nrow(.) %>% 
  comma(.)
  
nrow_clssStnd <- nrow(ovrllCohortTbl)
align_vec_clssstnd <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(ovrllCohortTbl) - 1))

kbl(CohortTblTT,booktabs=T, linesep="",caption= "Unique Student Interactions by Cohort", align=align_vec_clssstnd) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position","scale_down"), font_size = 10) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_clssStnd-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_clssStnd, bold=T) %>% 
  footnote(general = paste0("There are ", CohortYr_missing, " students with missing cohort data. Students with cohort years before AY2020-21 were also removed."), threeparttable = T)

```

\raggedright\textsf{\textbf{\textit{Unique Interactions by Transfer \& First-Generation Students Status (Unit: SG)}}}
```{r}
#| label: CrteTrnsfrSG
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false
#| tbl-cap: Unique Interactions by Transfer Status

  TrnsfrTabSG <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit== "SG") %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  tabyl(Transfer) %>% 
  rename("Count"= n, "Percentage(%)"=percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%  
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(,digits=2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~comma(.)))

nrow_trnsfr <- nrow(TrnsfrTabSG)
align_vec_trnsfr <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(TrnsfrTabSG) - 1))

kbl(TrnsfrTabSG, booktabs=T, align= align_vec_trnsfr) %>% 
  kable_styling(latex_options = "scale_down", full_width= F) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_trnsfr-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_trnsfr, bold= T) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)

```

```{r}
#| label: FirstGenSG
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false
#| tbl-cap: "Unique Interactions by First-Generation Status"

  SG1stGenTab <- Clean_Event %>% 
  filter(Unit== "SG") %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  rename("FirstGen"= "First-gen") %>% 
  tabyl(FirstGen) %>% 
  rename("Count"= n, "Percentage(%)"=percent) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%  
  adorn_totals("row") %>% 
  adorn_pct_formatting(,digits=2) %>% 
  mutate(across(Count, ~comma(.)))

nrow_FrstGen <- nrow(SG1stGenTab)
align_vec_trnsfer <- c("l", rep("c", ncol(SG1stGenTab) - 1))

kbl(SG1stGenTab, booktabs=T, align= align_vec_trnsfer) %>% 
  kable_styling(latex_options = "scale_down", full_width= F) %>% 
  row_spec(0, bold=T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_FrstGen-1,hline_after = T) %>% 
  row_spec(nrow_FrstGen, bold= T) #%>% 
  #footnote(symbol= footnote1)

```
